note: Source of truth for the required status checks on main. scripts/check_required_checks.py compares this list to live branch protection so the required set is code-reviewed, not silently drifted (see the git-history finding GH-CI-CHECK-DRIFT). When you add or remove a required check, edit BOTH this file and the live branch protection together (atomic update). A newly introduced context (e.g. multi-duck-review) can be required in live protection as soon as it has produced a status once - the introducing PR's own run does that - so it is added here and to branch protection together before that PR merges.
